description: Privileged API for injecting and managing the pinned-folder bar in the main Thunderbird window.

functions.name: updateBar
functions.description: Create or refresh the pinned-folder bar in all open 3-pane windows.

parameters.name: folders
parameters.description: Ordered list of pinned folders to display.

name.description: Short folder name for the button label

events.name: onFolderClicked
events.description: Fired when the user clicks a pinned-folder button.

events.name: onFolderDropped
events.description: Fired when messages are dropped onto a pinned-folder button.

events.name: onFolderUnpinRequested
events.description: Fired when the user right-clicks and selects Remove from a pinned button.
